heatmap.title: Malnutrition Intelligence Matrix
heatmap.subtitle: Risk distribution across age groups and villages
heatmap.clickToDrill: Click any cell to drill down
heatmap.insightConcentration: {pct}% of {risk} cases are concentrated in the {age} age group
heatmap.insightVillageRealloc: {healthy} shows strong screening results. Consider reallocating surplus resources to {worst} where {count} children need immediate attention.
heatmap.insightRiskDensity: The {age} age group has the highest risk density — {atRisk} of {total} children ({pct}%) need monitoring.
heatmap.insightSamAlert: SAM rate at {pct}% — exceeds WHO emergency threshold of 5%. Immediate nutritional intervention required.
heatmap.insightPositive: {pct}% of screened children are in normal nutritional status. Current nutrition programmes are showing positive outcomes.

abdm.title: ABDM / ABHA
abdm.subtitle: Ayushman Bharat Digital Health Mission
abdm.abhaDesc: Link children's health records to their unique ABHA ID for seamless government integration.
abdm.identityDesc: Manage digital health identities, consent, and data sharing across healthcare providers.
abdm.interopDesc: Connect with national health registries and government nutrition programmes.

sync.savedOffline: Saved offline. Will sync when connected.
sync.syncPartial: Synced {success}, but {fail} failed. Will retry later.
sync.syncFailed: Sync failed. Will retry when connection improves.
sync.goingOffline: You are offline. Data will be saved locally.
